meta.title: WordDino | Dig Up the Roots
meta.description: An English vocabulary tool powered by morphemes, mnemonics and root trees.

home.title: Learn words like a language archaeologist
home.subtitle: Morpheme breakdown, memorable stories and a root family tree in one flow.
home.placeholder: Type an English word, e.g. transport
home.methodTip: Understand structure first, story second, and reinforce via the root tree.

word.aiDisclaimer: Content is AI-generated for learning only. Cross-check with authoritative dictionaries.
word.generating: Unearthing morpheme fossils for this word...
word.notFound: Invalid input. Please use letters plus apostrophe or hyphen only.
word.morphemeFallback: This word is better memorized directly with mnemonic techniques.
word.treeHint: Zoom, drag and click nodes to navigate.

about.title: Method
about.content: WordDino combines familiar anchors with unfamiliar words. Understand morphology first, then reinforce memory with homophones, visual scenes and stories.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.content: No plaintext IP is stored. Anonymous votes are deduplicated via salted hash on random visitor identity, with minimal logging.
